testcase.name: test_bundle_action[listing_optimization]

failure.message: AssertionError: listing_optimization: headings {'GUEST_TARGETING', 'SEO_POSITIONING', 'AMENITIES_STRUCTURE', 'OPTIMIZED_TITLE', 'LISTING_DESCRIPTION'} vs expected {'OPTIMIZED TITLE', 'AMENITIES STRUCTURE', 'LISTING DESCRIPTION', 'SEO POSITIONING', 'GUEST TARGETING'} assert 0 >= 4 + where 4 = max(3, (5 - 1)) + where 5 = len({'AMENITIES STRUCTURE', 'GUEST TARGETING', 'LISTING DESCRIPTION', 'OPTIMIZED TITLE', 'SEO POSITIONING'})

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter5.py:203: in test_bundle_action assert overlap >= max(3, len(expected_headings) - 1), ( E AssertionError: listing_optimization: headings {'GUEST_TARGETING', 'SEO_POSITIONING', 'AMENITIES_STRUCTURE', 'OPTIMIZED_TITLE', 'LISTING_DESCRIPTION'} vs expected {'OPTIMIZED TITLE', 'AMENITIES STRUCTURE', 'LISTING DESCRIPTION', 'SEO POSITIONING', 'GUEST TARGETING'} E assert 0 >= 4 E + where 4 = max(3, (5 - 1)) E + where 5 = len({'AMENITIES STRUCTURE', 'GUEST TARGETING', 'LISTING DESCRIPTION', 'OPTIMIZED TITLE', 'SEO POSITIONING'})
